steps.title: Identify the sentence's opening role
steps.content: The underlined sentence introduces the term “microgenre” at the start of the passage, and that term immediately becomes the framework for everything that follows—hyperpop is presented as “the microgenre of electronic music.”

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content: The sentence defines “microgenre,” the key term the passage applies immediately afterward to frame hyperpop. The other choices misidentify the sentence's function: A and B ascribe it functions it lacks, while D falsely describes it as addressing the audience. That matches choice C — C is correct.
